paper_title: Multitask Prompted Training Enables Zero-Shot Task Generalization
evaluation_method: Zero-shot task generalization evaluation for T0, a model trained on a multitask mixture of prompted datasets. Held-out evaluation tasks include natural language inference, coreference resolution, sentence completion, and word sense disambiguation, plus BIG-bench tasks. For each dataset, median performance across prompts (up to 15) is reported along with interquartile range to measure prompt sensitivity. T0 uses a seq2seq (encoder-decoder) architecture, so evaluation is done by generating text and comparing to expected outputs. Accuracy is the primary metric.
